creator: alumina@ceramix.compress.to
text:
Can't supporting CD media change in ATAPI CD/DVD drive too.
Isn't support media change in CAM subsystem?


/var/log/messages
Feb 14 14:28:19 athena4 kernel: (cd0:ata2:0:0:0): READ CD. CDB: be 00 00 00 e8 f
9 00 00 01 f8 00 00 
Feb 14 14:28:19 athena4 kernel: (cd0:ata2:0:0:0): CAM status: SCSI Status Error
Feb 14 14:28:19 athena4 kernel: (cd0:ata2:0:0:0): SCSI status: Check Condition
Feb 14 14:28:19 athena4 kernel: (cd0:ata2:0:0:0): SCSI sense: MEDIUM ERROR asc:1
5,0 (Random positioning error)
Feb 14 14:28:19 athena4 kernel: (cd0:ata2:0:0:0): Info: 0xe8f9
Feb 14 14:28:19 athena4 kernel: (cd0:ata2:0:0:0): Retrying command (per sense da
ta)
